# anthropic_workspaces (Data Source)

Lists all Anthropic workspaces in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_workspaces" "all" {
  include_archived = false
}

output "workspace_names" {
  value = [for w in data.anthropic_workspaces.all.workspaces : w.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `include_archived` (Boolean) Whether to include archived workspaces in the response.

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (String)
- `compartment_id` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `data_residency` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces--data_residency))
- `display_color` (String)
- `external_key_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces--data_residency"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces.data_residency`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_inference_geos` (List of String)
- `default_inference_geo` (String)
- `workspace_geo` (String)
